L1.head: manipulation of ligand composition and structural characteristics
L1.tail: optimized design principles of quasi-metal-organic frameworks (QMOFs)
L1.claim: 调整配体组成和结构特性使得QMOFs设计原则的优化成为可能

L1.head: optimized design principles of quasi-metal-organic frameworks (QMOFs)
L1.claim: 优化的设计原则增强了类酶催化活性

L1.head: enhanced enzyme-like catalytic activities
L1.claim: 增强的催化活性促进了靶向肿瘤治疗

L1.head: understanding interplay between porosity, metal centers, and ligand interactions
L1.tail: creation of QMOFs with superior catalytic properties
L1.claim: 理解各因素相互作用使得创建具有优越催化性能的QMOFs成为可能

L1.head: creation of QMOFs with superior catalytic properties
L1.tail: immune responses through ferroptosis and immunogenic cell death
L1.claim: 具有优越催化性能的QMOFs通过铁死亡和免疫原性细胞死亡机制促进免疫反应

L2.head: controlled deligandation strategy
L2.tail: electronic environment and coordination geometry of metal centers
L2.claim: 控制的去配体化策略显著改变了金属中心的电子环境和配位几何

L2.head: altered electronic environment and coordination geometry
L2.claim: 这些改变增强了催化效率

L2.head: tuning the degree of ligand removal
L2.claim: 调节配体去除程度可调制纳米酶的活性位点

L2.head: modulated active sites
L2.claim: 活性位点的调制导致过氧化物酶和过氧化氢酶样活性的优化

L2.head: porous structure of iron-based quasi-metal-organic frameworks
L2.tail: selective release of reactive oxygen species (ROS) upon interaction with tumor cells
L2.claim: 铁基QMOFs的多孔结构促进了与肿瘤细胞相互作用时ROS的选择性释放

L2.head: selective release of reactive oxygen species (ROS)
L2.claim: ROS的选择性释放触发了铁死亡

L2.head: tailored modifications
L2.tail: accumulation of the nanozyme at the tumor site
L2.claim: 定制的修饰促进了纳米酶在肿瘤部位的积累

L2.head: accumulated nanozyme
L2.tail: anti-cancer effect by inhibiting tumor growth and promoting dendritic cell maturation and T lymphocyte infiltration
L2.claim: 积累的纳米酶通过抑制肿瘤生长并促进树突状细胞成熟和T细胞浸润增强了抗癌效果
